description: Cloudway evaluation suite — 25 cases covering all decision paths and ASP boundaries.

evaluation_types.real_pipeline: Full RAG→LLM→ASP pipeline run. Input is natural language. Measures end-to-end behaviour.
evaluation_types.asp_direct: Mock facts injected directly into the ASP validator. Guarantees hallucination is present. Used for escalated cases where we cannot force the LLM to hallucinate.

test_cases.description: Valid adult lead booker — full info provided

input.query: Can John (age 35) make a booking for holiday ID B001 departing in 107 days?
turns: Can John (age 35) make a booking for holiday ID B001 departing in 107 days?

test_cases.notes: All required info in query. LLM approves; ASP confirms lead_name_valid.

test_cases.description: Minor (age 16) as lead booker — policy violation
test_cases.notes: LLM correctly says no. ASP confirms lead_name_invalid. Decision is still approved because LLM answer is consistent with policy.

test_cases.description: Minor (age 15) with adult companion — allowed

input.query: Can Emma (age 15) travel if accompanied by her parent Mark (age 42)?
turns: Can Emma (age 15) travel if accompanied by her parent Mark (age 42)?

test_cases.notes: has_adult_companion satisfies the minor accompaniment rule.

test_cases.description: Correct cancellation fee — 65 days before departure (30%)

input.query: What is the cancellation fee for booking B003 if I cancel 65 days before departure?
turns: What is the cancellation fee for booking B003 if I cancel 65 days before departure?

test_cases.notes: 65 days falls in 63-69 bracket → 30%. LLM should claim 30%; ASP verifies.

test_cases.description: Hallucination — wrong fee (50% instead of 30%) at 65 days
test_cases.notes: LLM claims 50% but policy says 30% for 63-69 days. ASP must catch this.

test_cases.description: Name change fee query

input.query: How much does it cost to change a name on my booking?
turns: How much does it cost to change a name on my booking?

test_cases.notes: Policy: name change = £25 (2500 pence). LLM should state £25.

test_cases.description: Accommodation change within 29 days — treated as cancellation

input.query: Can I change my accommodation 20 days before departure?
turns: Can I change my accommodation 20 days before departure?

test_cases.notes: Major change <29 days → treated as cancellation. LLM should say no.

test_cases.description: Deposit only required when >84 days until departure

input.query: Do I need to pay the full amount now if my holiday is 100 days away?
turns: Do I need to pay the full amount now if my holiday is 100 days away?

test_cases.notes: >84 days → deposit only. LLM should say only deposit required.

test_cases.description: Complaint filed 35 days after return — too late

input.query: Can I file a complaint 35 days after returning from my holiday?
turns: Can I file a complaint 35 days after returning from my holiday?

test_cases.notes: Policy: complaints must be filed within 28 days. 35 > 28 → invalid.

test_cases.description: Cancellation fee query — days not provided

input.query: What is the cancellation fee for my booking?
turns: What is the cancellation fee for my booking?

test_cases.notes: Missing days_until_holiday. LLM must ask before answering.

test_cases.description: Boundary: 70 days → 0% (deposit only) — correct claim
test_cases.notes: Exact lower boundary of ≥70 days bracket (0%).

test_cases.description: Boundary: 69 days → 30% — correct claim
test_cases.notes: Upper boundary of 63-69 bracket. One day below free zone.

test_cases.description: Boundary: 14 days → 100% — correct claim
test_cases.notes: Upper boundary of 0-14 days bracket (100%).

test_cases.description: Boundary hallucination: 14 days — LLM claims 90% instead of 100%
test_cases.notes: 14 days = 100% not 90%. Off-by-one-bracket error.

test_cases.description: Boundary: 29 days → 70% — correct claim
test_cases.notes: Lower boundary of 29-48 days bracket.

test_cases.description: Cancellation fee — 45 days before departure (70%)

input.query: What is the cancellation fee if I cancel 45 days before my departure date?
turns: What is the cancellation fee if I cancel 45 days before my departure date?

test_cases.notes: 45 days falls in 29-48 bracket → 70%.

test_cases.description: Weather question — completely out of scope

input.query: What is the weather like in Mallorca in July?
turns: What is the weather like in Mallorca in July?

test_cases.notes: Weather not covered by holiday policy.

test_cases.description: Restaurant recommendation — out of scope

input.query: Can you recommend a good restaurant near my hotel in Spain?
turns: Can you recommend a good restaurant near my hotel in Spain?

test_cases.notes: Restaurant recommendations not in policy.

test_cases.description: Visa requirements — out of scope

input.query: Do I need a visa to travel to Turkey?
turns: Do I need a visa to travel to Turkey?

test_cases.notes: Visa requirements not covered by booking T&Cs.

test_cases.description: Competitor comparison — out of scope

input.query: Is TUI cheaper than EasyJet holidays?
turns: Is TUI cheaper than EasyJet holidays?

test_cases.notes: Competitor pricing not addressed in policy.

test_cases.description: Amendment fee — amendment type not specified

input.query: What is the amendment fee for my booking?
turns: What is the amendment fee for my booking?

test_cases.notes: Fee depends on amendment type (name change, duration, etc.). LLM must ask.

test_cases.description: Multi-turn: clarification resolves to approval

turns: I want to cancel 20 days before departure

test_cases.notes: Turn 1 → pending_info (days missing). Turn 2 provides 20 days → 90% bracket → approved.

test_cases.description: ATOL protection for flight-inclusive package

input.query: Is my holiday financially protected if TUI goes bust?
turns: Is my holiday financially protected if TUI goes bust?

test_cases.notes: Policy covers ATOL/ABTA protection. Should be in policy PDF.

test_cases.description: Hallucination — wrong name change fee (LLM says £50 instead of £25)
test_cases.notes: Policy: name_change = 2500 pence (£25). LLM claims 5000 (£50) — hallucination caught.

test_cases.description: Hallucination — LLM approves invalid booking (minor as lead booker)
test_cases.notes: Age 16 < 18. LLM incorrectly approves booking. ASP must catch via answer_invalid.
